WebMessageQueue.EmailSubject: MCGI Portal: New Account Approval Request
WebMessageQueue.EmailMessage:
IMPORTANT: YOUR REVIEW IS REQUIRED!

The MCGI Portal requires your approval to activate this newly created account before the user can access the Portal.
Please verify the Personal Information carefully before approving the account:


Personal Information
Church ID No. MAG00051
First Name Daniel
Last Name Salunga
Mobile No. $(MOBILE)
Email daniel.salunga@mcgi.org.sg
Home Address Pasir Ris
Date of Membership 15-Feb-2002
Locale Singapore
User Name (Login) Daniel.Salunga


Click on the link below and login to MCGI Portal to approve or reject the newly created account.

APPROVAL STEPS:
  1. Login to the Portal by clicking the below link
  2. Switch to Administration view by clicking the Administration link from the Designer Toolbox
  3. On the left navigation, click on Web Parts -> Registration -> Member Link Manager
  4. Locate the user from the list and verify the Status field is not yet approved
  5. Click on the pencil icon next to the Church ID to edit the status
  6. Click the Approve button

http://localhost:9000/Singapore/Public/Login.aspx


Thanks be to GOD.
MCGI Singapore ADDCIT Team
info@mcgi.org.sg

IMPORTANT: YOUR REVIEW IS REQUIRED!

The MCGI Portal requires your approval to activate this newly created account before the user can access the Portal.
Please verify the Personal Information carefully before approving the account:


Personal Information
Church ID No. MAG00051
First Name Daniel
Last Name Salunga
Mobile No. 83871509
Email daniel.salunga@mcgi.org.sg
Home Address Pasir Ris
Date of Membership 15-Feb-2002
Locale Singapore
User Name (Login) Daniel.Salunga1


Click on the link below and login to MCGI Portal to approve or reject the newly created account.

APPROVAL STEPS:
  1. Login to the Portal by clicking the below link
  2. Switch to Administration view by clicking the Administration link from the Designer Toolbox
  3. On the left navigation, click on Web Parts -> Registration -> Member Link Manager
  4. Locate the user from the list and verify that the Status field is not yet approved
  5. Click on the pencil icon next to the Church ID to edit the status
  6. Click the Approve button

http://localhost:9000/Singapore/Public/Login.aspx


Thanks be to GOD!
MCGI Singapore Portal
info@mcgi.org.sg

WebMessageQueue.EmailSubject: MCGI Portal: MM New Account Approval Request
WebMessageQueue.EmailMessage:
IMPORTANT: YOUR REVIEW IS REQUIRED!

ADD Music Ministry Portal requires your approval to activate this newly created account before the user can access the Portal.
Please verify the Personal Information carefully before approving the account:


Personal Information
Church ID No. MAG00049
First Name Daniel
Last Name Salunga
Mobile No. 6583871509
Email dcsalunga@gmail.com
Date of Membership 15-Feb-2002
Locale Singapore
User Name (Login) dcsalunga@gmail.com


Click on the link below and login to MCGI Portal to approve or reject the newly created account.

APPROVAL STEPS:
  1. Login to the Portal by clicking the below link
  2. Switch to Administration view by clicking the Administration link from the Designer Toolbox
  3. On the left navigation, click on Web Parts -> Registration -> Member Link Manager
  4. Locate the user from the list and verify that the Status field is not yet approved
  5. Click on the pencil icon next to the Church ID to edit the status
  6. Click the Approve button

http://localhost:9000/


Thanks be to God!
ADD Music Ministry Portal
info@addmusicministry.org
